name: Billing
description: A billing plane with no new primitive: an invoice is an aggregation view over settled turn receipts (each line item carries its settle-receipt hash), sealed as its own turn receipt; a spend cap is a rate-limited-allowance ceiling cell (an over-cap charge refused by the executor — the 402 shape); an estimate is a pure fn over a rate card; the recurring half rides the standing-obligation capacity.

heap_collections.ALLOWANCE_COLL: 0x000A110E — the rate-limited-allowance ledger (the forge-detecting spend cap): terms digest, current-epoch cursor, spent-this-epoch, cumulative spent

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry

affordances.charge: cap-only, Signature (a cap-guarded charge — the executor's FieldLteField(SPENT <= CAP) tooth refuses an over-cap charge in-band, the 402; the value moves by a conserving Transfer)
affordances.seal: cap-only, Signature (seal the period's invoice as its own turn receipt — bind the invoice body_hash into the cell)

deos.seam: PARTIAL — the spend-cap CEILING (FieldLteField(SPENT <= CAP)) and the value MOVE (a conserving Transfer) are REAL verified turns the executor enforces + the kernel conserves; the allowance heap ledger and the invoice body_hash mirror are executor-side / cell-committed steps (the named SpendAllowance / sealed-digest in-circuit seam the allowance + obligation capacities describe). This is a billing VIEW + CEILING over settled turns, not a metering engine.
